arts.ttl: Kerr to take technical director job at Hearts
arts.sum: Shelley Kerr, former Scotland head coach, is close to taking on the role of technical director at Heart of Midlothian, working with the club's male players.

arts.ttl: Kerr to take technical director job at Hearts
arts.sum: Shelley Kerr, former Scotland head coach, is close to taking on the role of technical director at Heart of Midlothian, where she will work exclusively with male players.
